name: devbot
description: A Discord bot that answers and acts on development requests with local Codex project context.

scripts.clean: node --input-type=module -e "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })"
scripts.state:backup: npm run build && node dist/state-backup.js create
scripts.state:verify: npm run build && node dist/state-backup.js verify
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run coverage
